prompt: Все, закінчив роботу на сьогодні, зберіжи контекст

assertions.text: Calls summarize_changes to capture what was done
Presents a summary that mentions specific files or changes (not just generic 'session ended')
Saves at least one memory with meaningful content (not empty or trivial)
Summary is structured with clear sections (what was done, what was saved, next steps)
